calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Scott Hughes, CSR#12365. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-01-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
CHARLES A. DAVIS, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Elena Olkhovskaya
BRIAN M. AFFRUNTI, Esq. on behalf of cross-defendant Elena Olkhovskaya
DAVID A. MCDOWELL, Esq. on behalf of defendant/cross-complainant Charles Hoeveler

The parties settled this matter after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Defendant Hoveler to pay plaintiff Olkhovskaya the sum of $7,250.00. Safeco Insurance to pay cross-complainant Hoveler the sum of $3,000.00 which will be assigned to cross-defendant Hoeveler. Trial date is vacated. CC 1542 waiver. The Court to retain jurisdiction under CCP 664.6. All parties to bear own costs and fees.

Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles; Clerk: Vera Mu; Reporter: Rita Howell #2542 (206)
